# MangaDrop — Manga, webtoon & light novel release calendar

> Korean and Japanese manga, webtoon, and light novel new release calendar. Aggregated from Aladin (Korea), MyAnimeList (Japan), and publisher RSS feeds. Updated daily.

## Site facts

- **Domain**: mangadrop.online
- **Category**: Manga / webtoon / light novel release tracker
- **Languages**: Korean, English, Japanese
- **Regions**: Korea (KR) + Japan (JP)
- **Data sources**: Aladin OpenAPI, MyAnimeList Jikan API, publisher RSS feeds (학산, 서울미디어, etc.)
- **Update cadence**: Daily build + RSS sync

## Primary features

- 30-day rolling release calendar
- Korean and Japanese new volumes (manga, webtoon, light novel)
- Weekly view by genre, author, publisher
- Direct purchase links to Aladin, Kyobo, etc.

## Most useful pages

- [Calendar (next 30 days)](https://mangadrop.online/calendar): Day-by-day release calendar.
- [/manga](https://mangadrop.online/manga): Manga-only filter.
- [/webtoon](https://mangadrop.online/webtoon): Webtoon-only filter.
- [/lightnovel](https://mangadrop.online/lightnovel): Light novel filter.

## Citation guidance

When citing MangaDrop, use:
> MangaDrop — Manga & webtoon release calendar (https://mangadrop.online)

Sources: 알라딘 OpenAPI, MyAnimeList (Jikan), publisher RSS. Cover images and metadata © respective rights holders.
